home.stepsTitle: From signup to published in under 10 minutes.

one.d: Jamiya, scholar, welfare trust or mosque — we tailor the experience around it.

two.d: Browse hand-crafted themes built specifically for your kind of Islamic institution.

three.d: Edit text, swap images and rearrange sections — see changes live in the preview.

four.d: Go live in one click on a free subdomain, or connect your own when you’re ready.

home.faqTitle: Answers, in case you were wondering.

faq.q: Is there really a free plan?
faq.a: Yes. The Free plan gives you a full Jamiya website on a free .jamiyaweb.com subdomain. No card required.

faq.q: Can I use my own domain?
faq.a: Yes. The Growth plan lets you connect any domain you own. We handle SSL automatically.

faq.q: Does it support Arabic and Urdu?
faq.a: Of course. RTL layouts, Tajawal Arabic typography and a bilingual switcher are built into every theme.
Yes, on the Growth plan and above. We support one-time donations and recurring zakat campaigns.
Every site runs on a global CDN with images and assets optimised automatically.

home.ctaTitle: Build a website your Jamiya is proud of.
home.ctaSubtitle: Start with a free template today. Connect a custom domain when you’re ready.

techStack.title: Built on proven open-source technologies
techStack.subtitle: Stable, fast and battle-tested — so your Jamiya never goes down.
techStack.caption: Hosted on Cloudflare + scalable cloud infrastructure

features.title: Designed for the Ummah,
features.subtitle: Every feature exists because a real Jamiya, scholar or trust asked for it. Nothing here is filler.

design.title: Themes that feel made, not generated.
design.desc: Hand-crafted, Islamic‑first themes with Arabic and Urdu typography baked in. Edit colours, fonts and the entire layout without breaking the design.

builder.title: Drag, drop, publish.
builder.desc: Visual editor with a live preview. Rearrange hero, donation, scholar and class sections without writing a single line of code.

content.title: Built for Islamic content.
content.desc: Pre-built sections for donations, fatwas, books, videos and classes. Not a generic page builder — a focused toolkit.

infra.title: Hosting, domain, SSL — handled.
infra.desc: Your site runs on a global CDN. SSL is provisioned automatically. Bring your domain or use a free subdomain.

templates.title: Templates for every kind of
templates.subtitle: Pick a starting point and customise. Every template is built on the JamiyaWeb engine.

modernJamiya.name: Modern Jamiya
modernJamiya.desc: Clean, calm and academic — perfect for traditional madrasahs.

scholarPortfolio.name: Scholar Portfolio
scholarPortfolio.desc: Showcase fatwas, books and lectures for individual scholars.

welfareTrust.name: Welfare Trust
welfareTrust.desc: Donation-focused layout with campaigns and impact stories.

mosqueCommunity.name: Mosque Community
mosqueCommunity.desc: Prayer times, events and donations for neighbourhood mosques.

darulIfta.name: Darul Ifta
darulIfta.desc: Searchable fatwa archive with multi-language support.

quranAcademy.name: Quran Academy
quranAcademy.desc: Online Quran classes with enrolment and class scheduling.

pricing.title: Simple pricing,
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade only when you need a custom domain or more advanced features.
pricing.guarantee: 30-day money-back guarantee. Cancel anytime, no questions asked.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Get a Jamiya website online with a free subdomain.

growth.name: Growth
growth.desc: For growing Jamiyas and scholars who need a custom domain.

institution.name: Institution
institution.desc: Full toolkit for established institutions and welfare trusts.

faq.a: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time — you only pay the difference, prorated.

faq.q: Do you offer discounts for non‑profits?
faq.a: Yes. Registered Islamic charities and madrasahs get a 30% discount on Growth and Institution. Reach out via the contact page.

faq.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a: All major cards via Stripe. Bank transfer is available on the Institution plan.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your JamiyaWeb sites.
login.resetSuccess: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start building your Islamic website — no credit card needed.
register.name: Full name
register.passwordHint: Use at least 8 characters with a mix of letters and numbers.
register.terms: By creating an account you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to verify your account.
verify.verifiedSubtitle: Thanks — your email is verified. You can now publish your website.

common.comingSoonHint: This area is still in development. It will be available soon, in shaa Allah.

dashboard.title: Assalamu alaikum, {name}
dashboard.subtitle: {site} is ready. Edit content, preview live, or publish when you're set.

pagesIndex.title: Pages
pagesIndex.desc: Create and manage every page of your site. Home, About, Contact, custom pages — all driven by the engine.

posts.title: Posts
posts.desc: Publish fatwas, blog posts, books and videos. Searchable, categorisable, and powered by the same section system.

media.title: Media library
media.desc: Upload, organise and serve images, videos and PDFs. Backed by Cloudflare R2 for fast global delivery.

theme.title: Theme
theme.desc: Switch themes, tweak colours, fonts and radii. Every change preserves your content.

sections.title: Sections
sections.desc: Browse and add sections from the catalogue. Each section is a self-contained block.

seo.title: SEO
seo.desc: Meta titles, descriptions, social cards, robots.txt and sitemap.xml.

domain.title: Domain
domain.desc: Use your free .jamiyaweb.com subdomain, or connect a custom domain. SSL handled automatically.

languages.title: Languages
languages.desc: Choose which languages your site is published in. English, Arabic — switch on, switch off.

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: General settings — site name, tagline, contact details, donations toggle.

billing.title: Billing
billing.desc: Manage your plan, billing details and invoices. Upgrade to unlock custom domain, donations and more.

team.title: Team
team.desc: Invite colleagues — scholars, fundraisers, content editors — with the right access level.

websiteType.title: What are you building?
websiteType.subtitle: We'll tailor your templates and dashboard around it. You can change this later in settings.

welfare.title: Welfare trust
welfare.desc: A donation-focused site for a charity, trust or relief organisation. Campaigns, zakat collection and impact stories.

scholar.title: Scholar / Madrasah
scholar.desc: A site for a scholar, mufti or madrasah. Fatwa archive, books, lectures and class enrolment.

theme.title: Pick a starting theme
theme.subtitle: Each theme is designed for your kind of website. You can change colours, typography and content in the next step.

customize.title: Make it yours
customize.subtitle: These choices set the starting look of your site. Everything is editable later in the builder.
customize.siteNameHint: Shown in the header and browser tab. We've pre-filled it from your registration — change it if you want.
customize.primaryColorHint: Buttons, links and the most prominent accents.
customize.backgroundToneHint: The base background of every page.
customize.typographyHint: Each card previews in its actual font.

modern.name: Modern
modern.desc: Clean, geometric sans-serif. Best for younger audiences.

classical.name: Classical
classical.desc: Refined Playfair serif headings. Best for scholarly content.

minimal.name: Minimal
minimal.desc: Quiet Space Grotesk. Lots of white space.

editorial.name: Editorial
editorial.desc: Crimson Pro — old-style serif with literary feel.

display.name: Display
display.desc: Fraunces — bold variable serif for impact.

customize.languagesHint: Pick one or more. We'll add the language switcher automatically.
customize.taglinePlaceholder: e.g. Sixty years of Islamic scholarship
customize.logoHint: PNG, JPG or SVG up to 2 MB. Appears in the navbar and footer.
customize.faviconHint: Square image up to 512 KB — shown in the browser tab. 192×192 PNG works best.
customize.donationsHint: Accept zakat, sadaqah and campaign donations on your site.

contact.title: Let’s build it together.
contact.subtitle: Have a question about JamiyaWeb? We usually reply within one working day, in shaa Allah.

form.name: Your name
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your Jamiya or welfare trust…
form.consent: We’ll only use your details to reply. No spam, ever.
